mapper.sql: fitCardId, cardType, cardName, cardPrice, validity, cardImgUrl, cardRule, createdDate,storeAddrIds,useCount,showStoreAddrIds
mapper.select: select fitCardId, cardType, cardName, cardPrice, validity, cardImgUrl, cardRule, createdDate,storeAddrIds,useCount,showStoreAddrIds from fit_card where fitCardId = #{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into fit_card (fitCardId, cardType, cardName, cardPrice, validity, cardImgUrl, cardRule, createdDate,storeAddrIds,useCount,showStoreAddrIds) values (#{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{validity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cardImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{showStoreAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into fit_card
fitCardId,
cardType,
cardName,
cardPrice,
validity,
cardImgUrl,
cardRule,
createdDate,
storeAddrIds,
useCount,
showStoreAddrIds,
#{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{cardType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cardName,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cardPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{validity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cardImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cardRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{showStoreAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update fit_card
cardType = #{cardType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cardName = #{cardName,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cardPrice = #{cardPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
validity = #{validity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cardImgUrl = #{cardImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardRule = #{cardRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
storeAddrIds = #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
useCount = #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
showStoreAddrIds = #{showStoreAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where fitCardId = #{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT f.*, c.ctName FROM fit_card f INNER JOIN card_type c ON c.cardType=f.cardType
and f.cardType = #{cardType} and (IFNULL(storeAddrIds, '') = '' or find_in_set(#{storeId}, storeAddrIds)) and (IFNULL(showStoreAddrIds, '') = '' or find_in_set(#{storeId}, showStoreAddrIds)) and f.status=1
